mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rqst_id) FROM board WHERE rqst_id IS NOT NULL AND rqst_id != ''
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_type LIKE 'SYSTEM_%' AND ins_dt >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_type = 'SYSTEM_USER_ROLE_REQUEST'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_type = 'SYSTEM_BACKUP_HISTORY'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_type = 'SYSTEM_BACKUP_HISTORY' AND UPPER(COALESCE(cont, '')) LIKE '%SUCCESS%'
